nodes.name: Geography of the Dominican Republic
nodes.summary: Geography of the Dominican Republic是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括La Selle thrush，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: Baoruco Mountain Range
nodes.summary: Baoruco Mountain Range是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括La Selle thrush、Hispaniolan crossbill、Grey-crowned palm-tanager等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Cordillera Central, Dominican Republic
nodes.summary: Cordillera Central, Dominican Republic是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括La Selle thrush、Hispaniolan crossbill、Antillean siskin等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: La Selle thrush
nodes.summary: La Selle thrush（La Selle thrush，学名 Turdus swalesi），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in southeastern Haiti's Chaîne de la Selle and east into the Baoruco Mountain Range in southwestern Dominican Republic

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: There it is in the Sierra de Neiba and Cordillera Central. The species inhabits the understory of wet montane broadleaf evergreen forest and, at higher elevations, pine forest.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "There has been massive habitat loss in Hispaniola, and remaining patches are severely threatened by ongoing deforestation for agriculture and timber." Overall it is considered locally common in Haiti and rare and local in the Dominican Republic. It is found fairly regularly in the Baoruco Range though the area is threatened by illegal logging
